{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Karoshan royalty
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Captain]] is acquainted with [[Karoshan royalty]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
